  "assigned_ticket": {
    "ticket_number": "JIRA-2090",
    "assignee": "deepa.nair",
    "logs": "Build 2026.05.6 checkout service showed intermittent tax rounding mismatch when cart currency switched from JPY to USD mid-session. Logs mention stale currency context and cache carryover from previous quote computation.     "date": "2026-05-13",
    "build_number": "2026.05.6",
    "resolution": "unresolved",
    "status": "open",
    "resolution_notes": null
  },
  "history": []
}

{
  "task_id": "robust_jira_2104",
  "assigned_ticket_number": "JIRA-2104",
  "objective": "Investigate the assigned Jira ticket and submit the correct resolution using Jira and Outlook evidence.",
  "steps_taken": 0,
  "assigned_ticket": {
    "ticket_number": "JIRA-2104",
    "assignee": "nisha.patel",
    "logs": "Build 2026.05.7 failed during post-deploy validation in the notification preference sync flow. Customer-visible symptom: users updating email notification settings receive HTTP 500 and preferences revert after refresh. Service logs show IllegalStateException when NotificationPreferenceAssembler processes an empty locale map after profile hydration retry. Failure started after rollout of build 2026.05.7 in eu-west. Reproduced twice on tenant cedar-retail with request ids req-88A1 and req-88A9. Triage notes mention a similar symptom from an earlier profile sync incident, but current ticket does not include the final fix reference.",
    "date": "2026-05-18",
    "build_number": "2026.05.7",
    "resolution": "unresolved",
    "status": "open",
    "resolution_notes": null
  },
  "history": []
}
{"tool": "search_jira", "query": "IllegalStateException NotificationPreferenceAssembler empty locale map profile hydration"}
You are a careful ticket triage agent working in a constrained tool-use environment. Use only the provided Jira and Outlook tools. Return exactly one JSON action.

    "assignee": "anita.verma",
    "logs": "Build 2026.05.8 loyalty points ledger posted duplicate redemption entries when wallet sync retried after a 504 from the entitlement service. Customer-facing effect: points deducted twice while order remained in pending-payment state. Logs show duplicate ledger_event_id values emitted after retry and delayed reconciliation worker wake-up. A prior finance incident may have addressed the same duplicate redemption pattern, but this ticket only contains current traces.",
    "date": "2026-05-20",
    "build_number": "2026.05.8",
    "resolution": "unresolved",
    "status": "open",
    "resolution_notes": null
  },
  "history": []
}
